name: velvet-shaker-01
description: Dark-modernist cocktail bar / speakeasy template. Two-token palette (canvas #0F100A + ink #E6E0C6, no accent). Inter Tight only — first serif-free template in the catalog. Weight-locked hierarchy (all 500, size-only). Wordmark-bookend pattern: small nav wordmark + massive 102px footer echo on every page. Non-sticky minimal text nav. Recreation of velvet-shaker.framer.website. See research/template-audits/velvet-shaker-01.md.
